"'''The Starships of Episode III'''" was an article written by [[Daniel Wallace]] for [[Star Wars Insider 82|''Star Wars Insider'' 82]] and provided details on a number of the various ships seen (or intended to be seen) in [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']]. It later was printed in ''[[Star Wars: The Official Magazine 59]]''.

==Contents==
*[[Invisible Hand/Legends|''Invisible Hand'']]
*[[Venator-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Venator''-class Star Destroyer]]
*[[Recusant-class light destroyer/Legends|Commerce Guild Destroyer]]
*[[Munificent-class star frigate/Legends|InterGalactic Banking Clan Frigate]]
*[[Droid tri-fighter/Legends|Droid Tri-fighter]]
*[[Techno Union/Legends|Techno Union]] [[Mankvim-814 light interceptor/Legends|''Mankvim''-814 Interceptor]]
*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Alpha-3 Nimbus-class V-wing starfighter/Legends|V-Wing]]
*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Aggressive ReConnaissance-170 starfighter/Legends|ARC-170]]
*[[Eta-2 Actis-class interceptor/Legends|Jedi Interceptor]]
*[[Tantive IV/Legends|''Tantive IV'']]
